email_targets.description: Send alert notification to the configured email targets, e.g. "email_targets":["...", "..."]

interval.description: Triggering the alert at the numeric interval

severity.description: Severity of the alert, either "critical" or "warning"

sms_targets.description: Send alert notification to the configured SMS targets, e.g. "sms_targets":["...", "..."]

subcategory.description: Sub category is the template name of the alert

threshold.description: Triggering the alert when reaching the specified numeric threshold value

begin_dt.description: Collect the data for the report from this "begin_dt"

copy_remote.description: Enable to copy the report to the configured SCP/SFTP server

email_targets.description: Send report to the configured email targets, e.g. "email_targets":["...", "..."]

end_dt.description: Collect the data for the report till this "end_dt"

sms_targets.description: Send report to the configured SMS targets, e.g. "sms_targets":["...", "..."]

subcategory.description: Sub category is the template name of the report

parameters.description: Starting point to return rows from a result set. i.e Default: 0
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Limit the number of rows returned from a result set. i.e Default: 25
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Whether to calculate the total item count
parameters.name: calculate_count
